# add_cohort_name { #cdmconnector.add_cohort_name }

```python
add_cohort_name(cohort, cohort_set)
```

Left join cohort_set to add cohort_name by cohort_definition_id.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

| Name       | Type   | Description                                        | Default    |
|------------|--------|----------------------------------------------------|------------|
| cohort     | Any    | Ibis table with cohort_definition_id.              | _required_ |
| cohort_set | Any    | Ibis table with cohort_definition_id, cohort_name. | _required_ |

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

| Name   | Type                  | Description                           |
|--------|-----------------------|---------------------------------------|
|        | ibis.expr.types.Table | Cohort with cohort_name column added. |
